creator: miwi@FreeBSD.org
text:
Quick update: We spent quite some time on the qt47-x11 issue, but we have not identified a permanent solution yet. We've asked Gnome developers for help on the following thread:

https://lists.freebsd.org/pipermail/freebsd-gnome/2016-January/033483.html

Note: This issue is not a regression of the CentOS 6.77 update, it is also reproducible with the current version in ports. 

Thanks Martin
